name: Potato Appetizers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chives or green onions (finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop potatoes.
2. Place potatoes in a pot and cover with water.
3. Boil until soft.
4. Mash cooked potatoes with oil, then add seasonings.
5. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
6. Shape mixture into 1-inch balls.
7. Mix paprika and wheat germ together in a dish.
8. Roll potato balls in the paprika and wheat germ mixture until coated.
9. Place on an oiled baking sheet.
10. Bake at 375 degrees for about 20 minutes.
11. Let stand on folded paper towels before serving with toothpicks.
Total calories per serving: 77
Fat: 3 grams
